---
title: "Publications"
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Links

- **Google Scholar**: add your profile link
- **ORCID**: add your ORCID link
- **GitHub**: <https://github.com/ZhouYuFZU>
:::

## Journal Articles

- **Zhou, Y.** Add your paper title. *Journal Name*, Year. [DOI](#) [PDF](#)

## Conference Papers

- **Zhou, Y.** Add your conference paper title. *Conference Name*, Year. [Link](#)

## Working Papers

- **Zhou, Y.** Add your working paper title. Manuscript in preparation.

## How to Update

Keep the newest work at the top. A useful format is:

```markdown
- **Author**, Coauthor. Paper title. *Journal or Conference*, Year. [DOI](link) [PDF](link) [Code](link)
```
